tips_en: Start with Claw-Eval (paper 2) because its multi-dimensional evaluation framework for autonomous agents offers a systematic view of evaluation pitfalls that also inform other domains. Its emphasis on trajectory-opaque grading and safety aligns with the concerns raised in Video‑MME‑v2 (paper 1) and provides a natural complement to the efficiency metric PTE introduced in paper 3.
tips_zh: 首先阅读 Claw‑Eval（论文 2），因为它提供的多维评估框架能够系统地揭示自主智能体的评估缺陷，这些问题同样影响视频理解基准（如论文 1）和工具推理效率（如论文 3），便于横向比较不同评估维度的挑战。
